**Stats (STR/CON/DEX/WIS/INT/CHA):** 5,000/5,000/5,000/10,000/15,000/15,000

**Unique Passives:**
- **Grief Aura (Passive)**: Creatures within 100 ft of Weeping Star are overcome with sorrow. They have disadvantage on attack rolls and must make a WIS save at the start of their turns or be unable to act for that turn (overcome by weeping).
- **Tears of the Fallen (Passive)**: Whenever any creature within 1 mile of Weeping Star dies, she regains 50 Mana and 200 Vitality. She feels each death as a distinct sorrow.
- **Memory of Loss (Passive)**: Weeping Star knows every creature who has ever died within 1 mile of her current position. She can manifest their spirits as translucent allies that act on her turn. Each spirit has 50 HP and deals 3d10 + Affinity Sorrow damage with a touch attack.

**Unique Actives:**
- **Cry of the Damned (Active)**: (10 Mana) 120 ft cone. Creatures must make a WIS save (DC 20 + Affinity) or take 12d10 + Affinity Sorrow damage and be Stunned with grief for 1 turn. Those who succeed take half damage.
- **Ocean of Tears (Active)**: (15 Mana) 200 ft radius is flooded with magically conjured salt water that acts as difficult terrain. Creatures in the water take 5d10 + Affinity Sorrow damage at the start of their turns. The water is supernaturally cold and dark.
- **Elegy of the End (Active)**: (30 Mana) Weeping Star sings a song of loss. All non-deity creatures in a 300 ft radius must make a CON save (DC 20 + Affinity) or be reduced to 1 HP and gain the Incapacitated condition for 1 turn. Those who succeed take 20d10 + Affinity Sorrow damage.

### Newcomen / Steam
**Level:** 100
**DR:** 1,000
**AC:** 55
**Speed:** 60
**Affinity:** Steam (+500)
**Gen Dmg Mod:** +500
**Resistance:** Heat, Water
**Weakness:** Cold, Ice
**Vitality:** 10,000d6 (784,500)
**Health:** 10,000d8 (45,000)
**Mana:** 10,000d6 (534,500)
**Stats (STR/CON/DEX/WIS/INT/CHA):** 15,000/15,000/5,000/15,000/10,000/5,000

**Unique Passives:**
- **Pressurized Core (Passive)**: Each time Newcomen takes damage, he builds 1 stack of Pressure. At 5 stacks, his next attack releases a burst of scalding steam in a 40 ft cone dealing 10d10 + Affinity Steam damage to all creatures in the area. Stacks reset after release.
- **Steam Screen (Passive)**: Newcomen emits thick steam in a 30 ft radius that heavily obscures vision. Non-deity creatures cannot see through the steam. Newcomen sees perfectly through it.

**Unique Actives:**
- **Pressure Blast (Active)**: (10 Mana) 80 ft cone. Creatures must make a DEX save (DC 20 + Affinity) or take 15d10 + Affinity Steam damage and be Blinded for 2 turns. Those who succeed take half damage.
- **Geyser Eruption (Active)**: (15 Mana) 60 ft radius at a point within 200 ft. A jet of superheated steam erupts from the ground. Creatures must make a STR save (DC 20 + Affinity) or be launched 60 ft into the air, taking 12d10 + Affinity Steam damage and falling damage.

### Pasteur / Mud
**Level:** 100
**DR:** 1,000
**AC:** 55
**Speed:** 60
**Affinity:** Mud (+500)
**Gen Dmg Mod:** +500
**Resistance:** Earth, Water
**Weakness:** Fire, Heat
**Vitality:** 10,000d6 (784,500)
**Health:** 10,000d8 (45,000)
**Mana:** 10,000d6 (784,500)
**Stats (STR/CON/DEX/WIS/INT/CHA):** 5,000/15,000/5,000/15,000/15,000/10,000

**Unique Passives:**
- **Sinking Ground (Passive)**: The ground within 100 ft of Pasteur turns to thick mud. Non-deity creatures treat it as difficult terrain and must make a STR save (DC 20) at the start of their turns or become Restrained as they sink in.
- **Purifying Filter (Passive)**: Pasteur is immune to Poison, Blight, and Disease effects. At the start of his turns, he removes all such effects from himself and all allied creatures within 60 ft.

**Unique Actives:**
- **Mudslide (Active)**: (10 Mana) 120 ft cone. A wave of mud sweeps over the area. Creatures must make a DEX save (DC 20 + Affinity) or take 12d10 + Affinity Mud damage and be Restrained for 2 turns as the mud hardens around them.
- **Fertile Burst (Active)**: (15 Mana) 80 ft radius. Pasteur enriches the mud in the area, causing rapid plant growth. Vines and roots grapple all non-deity creatures (STR save DC 20 + Affinity to break free). Grappled creatures take 5d10 + Affinity Mud damage at the start of their turns.

**Speed:** 60
**Affinity:** Dust (+500)
**Gen Dmg Mod:** +500
**Resistance:** Air, Void
**Weakness:** Water, Torrent

**Stats (STR/CON/DEX/WIS/INT/CHA):** 5,000/5,000/15,000/15,000/15,000/5,000

**Unique Passives:**
- **Cosmic Dust (Passive)**: Hubble's form is made of fine interstellar dust. Non-deity creatures within 60 ft take 5d10 + Affinity Dust damage at the start of their turns as particles abrade their skin and fill their lungs.
- **Obscuring Veil (Passive)**: Hubble is surrounded by a swirling cloud of dust in a 40 ft radius. Ranged attacks against Hubble have disadvantage, and creatures inside the cloud cannot see beyond 10 ft.

**Unique Actives:**
- **Dust Storm (Active)**: (10 Mana) 100 ft radius. A blinding dust storm rages for 3 turns. Creatures inside must make a CON save (DC 20 + Affinity) at the start of their turns or take 10d10 + Affinity Dust damage and gain the Blinded condition for that turn.
- **Stellar Nursery (Active)**: (20 Mana) Hubble compresses cosmic dust into 1d4+2 volatile star fragments at points within 200 ft. Each fragment explodes after 1 turn or when touched, dealing 15d10 + Affinity Dust damage in a 30 ft radius.

### Turing / Warp
**Level:** 100
**DR:** 1,000
**AC:** 55
**Speed:** 60
**Affinity:** Warp (+500)
**Gen Dmg Mod:** +500
**Resistance:** Psychic, Force
**Weakness:** Order, Law
**Vitality:** 10,000d6 (534,500)

**Stats (STR/CON/DEX/WIS/INT/CHA):** 10,000/10,000/20,000/15,000/10,000/5,000

**Unique Passives:**
- **Reality Glitch (Passive)**: At the start of each turn, a random 30 ft area within 200 ft of Turing becomes unstable. Creatures inside must make a WIS save (DC 20 + Affinity) or be teleported to a random location within 100 ft and take 5d10 + Affinity Warp damage.
- **Unstable Form (Passive)**: Attacks against Turing have a 20% miss chance as his form flickers and distorts through space. This is not a concealment effect and cannot be bypassed by True Sight.

**Unique Actives:**
- **Warp Bolt (Active)**: (10 Mana) 200 ft line. The attack distorts space along its path. Creatures must make a CON save (DC 20 + Affinity) or take 15d10 + Affinity Warp damage and be moved 30 ft in a random direction.
- **Fold Space (Active)**: (20 Mana) Turing folds space, teleporting himself and up to 5 allied creatures to any location he can see within 500 ft. Enemies within 30 ft of the departure and arrival points take 10d10 + Affinity Warp damage.

**AC:** 55
**Speed:** 60
**Affinity:** Nova (+500)
**Gen Dmg Mod:** +500
**Resistance:** Fire, Radiant
**Weakness:** Void, Cold

- **Orbital Path (Passive)**: Kepler orbits around a central point of his choice at the start of combat, moving 60 ft each turn automatically. While orbiting, he has +2 AC and cannot be flanked.

**Unique Actives:**
- **Nova Flare (Active)**: (10 Mana) 80 ft radius centered on Kepler. All creatures must make a CON save (DC 20 + Affinity) or take 15d10 + Affinity Nova damage and be Blinded for 2 turns. Those who succeed take half damage.
- **Stellar Collapse (Active)**: (20 Mana) Kepler compresses his energy into a dense point, then releases it. All creatures in a 120 ft radius must make a CON save (DC 20 + Affinity) or take 30d10 + Affinity Nova damage. Kepler is exhausted for 1 turn after using this.

- **Flash Freeze (Passive)**: When Rimeflame deals Cold damage to a creature that is currently On Fire, that creature takes an additional 10d10 + Affinity Frostfire damage and is Stunned for 1 turn.

- **Thermal Shockwave (Active)**: (15 Mana) 60 ft radius. Rimeflame rapidly alternates between extreme heat and extreme cold. Creatures must make a CON save (DC 20 + Affinity) or take 20d10 + Affinity Frostfire damage. Armor and weapons take permanent damage.

Creatures must make a DEX save (DC 20 + Affinity) or take 30d10 + Affinity Magma damage and gain On Fire (10 stacks). The area becomes difficult terrain for the rest of combat.

- **Summon Storm (Active)**: (20 Mana) 1 mile radius. Torrential rain falls for 1 hour. Visibility is reduced to 30 ft, ranged attacks have disadvantage, and non-deity creatures take 5d10 + Affinity Deluge damage at the start of their turns if exposed.

- **Stone Body (Passive)**: Shuddering Idol has DR 50 against all physical damage. He is immune to the Prone condition and cannot be moved by any effect.

**Unique Actives:**

- **Seismic Strike (Active)**: (15 Mana) Shuddering Idol makes a melee attack that sends shockwaves through the ground. The target takes 20d10 + Affinity Tremor damage and all creatures within a 40 ft line behind it must make a DEX save (DC 20 + Affinity) or take the same damage.

- **Fungal Symbiosis (Passive)**: Lung Spore is healed by Poison and Toxin damage instead of harmed. He can see through any spore or fungal growth within 1 mile.

- **Spore Bomb (Active)**: (15 Mana) Lung Spore launches a cluster of spores at a point within 200 ft. The cluster explodes in a 40 ft radius. Creatures must make a CON save (DC 20 + Affinity) or take 20d10 + Affinity Toxin damage and be Slowed for 2 turns.

### Black Mirror / Obsidian
**Level:** 100
**DR:** 1,000
**AC:** 55
**Speed:** 60
**Affinity:** Obsidian (+500)
**Gen Dmg Mod:** +500
**Resistance:** Psychic, Void
**Weakness:** Radiant, Light
**Vitality:** 10,000d6 (534,500)
**Health:** 10,000d8 (45,000)

**Unique Passives:**
- **Reflective Surface (Passive)**: Any spell or projectile that targets Black Mirror has a 30% chance to reflect back at the caster. Reflected effects use the same attack roll or save DC against their originator.
- **Shattering Form (Passive)**: When Black Mirror takes damage, she scatters into 1d4 Obsidian Shards. Each shard has 100 HP and attacks for 3d10 + Affinity Obsidian damage. If any shard survives until Black Mirror's next turn, she reforms from it.

**Unique Actives:**
- **Obsidian Shard (Active)**: (10 Mana) Black Mirror fires razor-sharp obsidian at a target within 200 ft. The target takes 15d10 + Affinity Obsidian damage and must make a CON save (DC 20 + Affinity) or bleed for 5d10 damage at the start of its turns for 3 turns.
- **Mirror World (Active)**: (20 Mana) Black Mirror creates a dome of reflective obsidian in a 100 ft radius for 3 turns. Inside the dome, all creatures see distorted reflections of themselves and must make a WIS save (DC 20 + Affinity) at the start of their turns or be Confused for that turn.

### Screaming Hymn / Shatter
**Level:** 100
**DR:** 1,000
**AC:** 55
**Speed:** 60
**Affinity:** Shatter (+500)
**Gen Dmg Mod:** +500
**Resistance:** Thunder, Force
**Weakness:** Psychic

**Unique Passives:**
- **Resonance (Passive)**: Each time Screaming Hymn deals damage, she applies 1 Resonance stack. At Resonance 5, the target takes an additional 10d10 + Affinity Shatter damage and all of its resistances are reduced by one tier for 1 turn.
- **Shattering Voice (Passive)**: Screaming Hymn's voice deals 3d10 + Affinity Shatter damage to all creatures within 30 ft whenever she speaks. Non-deity creatures must make a CON save (DC 20) to hear her without being Deafened for 1 turn.

**Unique Actives:**
- **Sonic Wave (Active)**: (10 Mana) 120 ft cone. A wave of pure sound rips through the area. Creatures must make a CON save (DC 20 + Affinity) or take 15d10 + Affinity Shatter damage, be Deafened for 3 turns, and have any concentration broken. Those who succeed take half damage.
- **Crescendo (Active)**: (20 Mana) Screaming Hymn unleashes a continuous scream for 1 turn. All creatures in a 200 ft radius must make a CON save (DC 20 + Affinity) at the start of each of their turns or take 10d10 + Affinity Shatter damage. Structures and objects in the area are destroyed at the end of the turn.

### Seraphael / Enceladus
**Level:** 100
**DR:** 1,000
**AC:** 55
**Speed:** 60
**Affinity:** Hallowed (+500)
**Gen Dmg Mod:** +500
**Resistance:** Blight, Necrotic, Corruption
**Weakness:** Necrotic, Corruption
**Vitality:** 8,000d6 (527,500)
**Health:** 8,000d8 (36,000)
**Mana:** 10,000d6 (534,500)
**Stats (STR/CON/DEX/WIS/INT/CHA):** 10,000/10,000/5,000/10,000/10,000/10,000

**Unique Passives:**
- **Cleansing Light (Passive)**: At the start of each of his turns, Seraphael removes all conditions and negative effects from himself and all allied creatures within 120 ft. This includes Withered, Corrupted, Cursed, and Poisoned.
- **Ward of Purity (Passive)**: Seraphael and allies within 60 ft are immune to Blight, Necrotic, Curse, Poison, and Miasma damage. Creatures of evil alignment within this area take 5d10 + Affinity Hallowed damage at the start of their turns.
- **Unbreakable Vow (Passive)**: Once per day, when Seraphael would be reduced to 0 Health, he instead is restored to full Health and Vitality. This represents his divine vow to protect the living.

**Unique Actives:**
- **Purifying Beam (Active)**: (8 Mana) 200 ft line, 10 ft wide. Creatures must make a CON save (DC 18 + Affinity) or take 15d10 + Affinity Hallowed damage. Creatures with Withered, Corrupted, or Cursed take double damage.
- **Sanctuary (Active)**: (12 Mana) 100 ft radius for 1 minute. Creatures of Seraphael's choice cannot enter this area. Evil creatures take 8d10 + Affinity Hallowed damage if they attempt to enter. Allies inside heal 2d10 Vitality at the start of their turns.
- **Divine Cleansing (Active)**: (20 Mana) 300 ft radius. All corruption, disease, poison, and negative magical effects in the area are cleansed. Evil creatures must make a CON save (DC 18 + Affinity) or take 20d10 + Affinity Hallowed damage and be Blinded for 3 turns.

### Hemalux / Mars
**Level:** 100
**DR:** 1,000
**AC:** 55
**Speed:** 80
**Affinity:** Bloodfire (+500)
**Gen Dmg Mod:** +500
**Resistance:** Torrent, Water, Force
**Weakness:** Water, Cold
**Vitality:** 10,000d6 (784,500)
**Health:** 8,000d8 (36,000)
**Mana:** 8,000d6 (277,500)
**Stats (STR/CON/DEX/WIS/INT/CHA):** 15,000/15,000/10,000/5,000/5,000/10,000

**Unique Passives:**
- **Bloodied Fury (Passive)**: When Hemalux is below 50% Vitality, his damage is doubled. When below 25%, his damage is tripled and he makes an additional attack each turn.
- **Oathbound (Passive)**: Hemalux cannot be forced to break an oath or abandon a sworn charge. He automatically passes all WIS saves related to loyalty, fear, or intimidation.
- **Sacrificial Guardian (Passive)**: Once per round, when an allied creature within 30 ft of Hemalux would take damage, he may intercept that damage, taking it himself instead. He gains +5 AC for 1 turn after doing so.

**Unique Actives:**
- **Blood Strike (Active)**: (8 Mana) Hemalux makes a melee attack that deals 15d10 + Affinity Bloodfire damage. He heals for half the damage dealt. If the target is below 50% HP, the damage is doubled.
- **Oath of Protection (Active)**: (12 Mana) Hemalux chooses one allied creature within 60 ft. For 1 minute, that creature cannot take damage while Hemalux is alive and within 30 ft of it. All damage that would hit the protected creature instead hits Hemalux.
- **Martyr's End (Active)**: (30 Mana) Hemalux reduces himself to 1 Vitality. For the next 3 turns, all allied creatures within 300 ft have immunity to all damage, conditions, and negative effects. At the end of the 3 turns, Hemalux heals for 50% of the damage he prevented during this time.



========================================================================
  MARKDOWN: Eyum TTRPG/5.0 Deities (WIP)/Ancient Pacts.md
========================================================================

None can predict what it is an ancient might want, their goals are seemingly random and their punishments random.

> For condition references see [[2.4 Conditions]]. For damage type references see [[2.2 Damage Types]].

## Newton
*Force*

**Tier 1 (3 days):** You gain Resistance to Force damage. Once per round, when a creature within 60 ft damages you, that creature takes 1d10 Force damage at the end of its next turn (equal force and opposite reaction). You must, once per day, measure something precisely (distance, weight, time) and record it. Failure results in you taking 1d10 Force damage at the start of each of your turns in combat for 3 days.

**Tier 2 (6 days):** Once per short rest, as an action, you create a 40 ft radius Gravity Well centered on a point within 60 ft. Creatures must make a STR save (DC 13) or be pulled to the center, taking 3d10 Force damage and gaining the Restrained condition. Restrained creatures can escape with a STR save (DC 13) as an action. You must, once per day, balance something perfectly (stack coins, balance a broom, stand on one leg for 1 minute). Failure results in you being Restrained at the start of each combat for 6 days.

**Tier 3 (10 days):** Once per long rest, for 1 minute, when a creature within 120 ft deals damage to anyone, you may redirect that exact amount of damage back at the attacker or at any other creature within range. You must, once per day, repay a debt exactly (no more, no less). Failure results in you taking double damage from all sources for 10 days.

**Tier 4 (16 days):** Once per long rest, as an action, you declare one creature or object within 120 ft to be "at rest." That target cannot move, be moved, or take any action for 2 turns. You must, by the end of the pact, keep a promise exactly as worded with no interpretation or loopholes. Failure results in you being unable to move or act for 1 turn at the start of each combat for 16 days.

**Tier 5 (30 days):** You gain all Newton Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, all your pacts and binding effects cannot be dispelled or removed by any means. Once per day, when you would take damage, be forcibly moved, or gain a condition, you may spend a Reaction to negate that instance entirely and reflect it onto the source. You must, by the end of the pact, create a system of rules or laws that at least 20 people follow. Failure results in the Slowed condition for 30 days that cannot be removed, and whenever you move you take 2d10 Force damage.

## Darwin
*Earth*

**Tier 1 (4 days):** You gain Resistance to Earth and Poison damage. When you take damage from a type you have not taken this combat, you gain Lesser Resistance to that damage type until your next long rest. You must, once per day, eat something raw and alive (a live insect, worm, or small fish). Failure results in the Sickened condition for 4 days and you lose all resistances.

**Tier 2 (8 days):** At the start of each of your turns, choose one: gain +2 AC, +10 ft speed, or +5 damage on your next attack. If you are below half Vitality, you may choose two. You must, once per day, bury something in the ground (a seed, a coin, a personal item). Failure results in Vulnerable to Earth damage and -10 ft speed for 8 days.

**Tier 3 (14 days):** As a bonus action, you may assume one of the following adaptations for 1 hour (may switch once per hour): Burrow speed 20 ft; Climb speed 30 ft; or Darkvision 60 ft. While adapted, you have advantage on attacks against creatures that cannot see you. You must, once per day, shed blood into soil (prick your finger and let it drip). Failure results in your body rejecting itself — you cannot regain Vitality from rest and healing is halved for 14 days.

**Tier 4 (20 days):** When you would drop to 0 Vitality, you instead drop to 1 and gain 1d20 Vitality. This can occur once per day. You gain Greater Resistance to Earth damage and ignore difficult terrain. You must, once per day, kill a creature with your bare hands or natural weapons and leave its body unburied. Failure results in -5 to STR, CON, and DEX scores for 3 days. If you reach 0 Vitality during this time, you die permanently.

**Tier 5 (35 days):** You gain all Darwin Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, once per day when you take damage, you may evolve (gain Lesser Resistance to that damage type; using it again upgrades to Resistance, then Greater Resistance). You must, before the pact ends, create a new lifeform (breed an animal, cultivate a plant, or cause a birth under your supervision). Failure results in permanent death — you are erased from existence and cannot be revived.

## Da Vinci
*Air*

**Tier 1 (3 days):** You gain Resistance to Air damage. You have advantage on one skill check of your choice per day (choose after rolling). You must, once per day, draw or sketch a design for something functional (a tool, a machine, a building). Failure results in you losing the ability to take Reactions for 3 days.

**Tier 2 (5 days):** As a bonus action, you may gain a 20 ft flying speed until the end of your turn. If you end your turn in the air, you fall normally. You must, once per day, hang upside down for 5 minutes. Failure results in Grounded for 5 days (cannot fly, teleport, or be moved magically).

**Tier 3 (9 days):** Once per short rest, as an action, you may create an air construct within 30 ft (wall, platform, cage, or blade) that lasts 10 minutes. It has AC 18 and 40 HP. If used as a weapon, it deals 3d10 Air damage. You must, before the pact ends, build something with moving parts that serves a function. Failure results in -5 to all attack rolls and Sleight of Hand checks for 9 days.

**Tier 4 (15 days):** Once per long rest, as a Reaction, you may redirect any ranged attack, spell line, or projectile you can see within 60 ft to a new target within 30 ft of its original path. You may do this even if the effect would not normally be redirectable. You must, by the end of the pact, reach a high place Da Vinci directs you to and observe the world from there for 10 minutes. Failure results in the air turning against you — failing any check gives Suffocating for 2 turns for 15 days.

**Tier 5 (30 days):** You gain all Da Vinci Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, you gain +1 Action Point and +1 Bonus Action Point for the pact duration. Once per day, as an action, you may make a single attack that deals 12d10 Force damage and ignores all resistances, immunities, and damage reduction. You must, by the end of the pact, create a masterpiece that another creature willingly praises. Failure results in your genius being stolen — you cannot benefit from any feats, skill bonuses, or proficiencies for 30 days.

## Newcomen
*Steam*

**Tier 1 (2 days):** You gain Resistance to Steam, Fire, and Water damage. As a bonus action, you may vent steam: creatures within 5 ft must make a CON save (DC 12) or be pushed 10 ft and take 1d10 Steam damage. You must, today, boil water and inhale the steam for 10 seconds. Failure results in the Mute condition for 2 days.

**Tier 2 (4 days):** At the start of combat, gain Pressure equal to your level (max 50). Once per turn, you may spend any amount of Pressure to add +2 Steam damage per Pressure to an attack. Pressure resets at end of combat. You must, once per day, burn your hand on a hot surface (take at least 3 damage) and not heal it for 1 hour. Failure results in you taking 2d10 Steam damage at the start of each combat for 4 days.

**Tier 3 (8 days):** You have a 10 ft aura of scalding air. Enemies that start their turn in it take 2d10 Steam damage and have their speed reduced by 10 ft until the end of their turn. You must deal Steam damage at least once per day. Failure results in your speed being halved and taking 3d10 Steam damage whenever you Dash for 8 days.

**Tier 4 (14 days):** Once per long rest, as an action, you rupture your pressure in a 30 ft radius. All creatures (including you) must make a CON save (DC 15). On a fail they take 8d10 Steam damage and are pushed 30 ft away. You take half damage regardless. You must, once per day, sit in steam for at least 30 minutes. Failure results in you taking 1d10 Steam damage to HP at the start of each day (cannot heal below 1 HP) for 14 days.

**Tier 5 (28 days):** You gain all Newcomen Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, you may maintain Pressure between combats. You may spend 30 Pressure to gain an additional Action Point for one turn. You must deal at least 500 total Steam damage before the pact ends. Failure results in permanent Greater Weakness to Fire, Water, and Steam and permanent loss of half your maximum Vitality.

## Hubble
*Dust*

**Tier 1 (3 days):** You gain Resistance to Dust damage. You gain Darkvision 60 ft (or extend existing darkvision by 30 ft). You can see through fog, smoke, and dust as if it were not there. You must, each night, spend 10 minutes staring at the sky. Failure results in the Blinded condition for 3 days.

**Tier 2 (5 days):** As a bonus action, mark one creature you can see within 300 ft. You always know its direction and distance, and your attacks against it ignore cover. The mark lasts 1 hour. You may use this twice per day. You must remain covered in dust at all times — if you intentionally clean yourself, you fail the pact. Failure results in Grounded and -4 to Perception checks for 5 days.

**Tier 3 (9 days):** Once per short rest, as an action, you create a 20 ft radius Dust Field within 60 ft that lasts 10 minutes. Enemies inside are outlined (cannot benefit from invisibility or stealth). Allies inside are treated as stealthed. You may have one Dust Field active at once. You must kill at least 1 creature using Suffocation damage during the pact. Failure results in you taking 1d10 Dust damage at the start of each turn in combat for 9 days.

**Tier 4 (15 days):** You may change the damage type of any of your attacks to Dust damage. You double any Dust damage you deal. You must keep one eye covered at all times. While one eye is covered, you have disadvantage on ranged attacks and Perception checks. Failure results in half movement speed and Suffocating every other turn in combat for 15 days.

**Tier 5 (30 days):** You gain all Hubble Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, if you die during the pact period, you may reform your body from dust after 1 hour. Once per day, as an action, you may compress cosmic dust into 1d4 volatile star fragments within 120 ft. Each explodes after 1 turn, dealing 6d10 Dust damage in a 20 ft radius. You must apply the Suffocating condition to at least 10 people and all must die before the pact ends. Failure results in permanent death — to dust you return and cannot be revived.

## Pasteur
*Mud*

**Tier 1 (3 days):** You gain Resistance to Mud damage and immunity to disease and the Poisoned condition. When you deal damage, you may choose to infect the target — it takes 1d10 Mud damage at the start of its next turn. You must, today, wash your hands exactly once and only once. Failure results in Poisoned for 3 days and your healing is halved.

**Tier 2 (5 days):** While standing on dirt or mud, you deal an additional 1d8 Mud damage. When you deal Mud damage, you gain half of it back as Vitality. You must, once per day, consume something fermented or spoiled on purpose. Failure results in Slowed and Grounded for 5 days.

**Tier 3 (9 days):** As an action, you may sink into mud and move through it. While inside mud, you cannot take other actions and cannot be targeted unless by fire damage. Leaving ends your turn. You must, once per day, take this mud-sinking action or you cannot take short rests for 9 days.

**Tier 4 (15 days):** Once per day, choose a creature within 60 ft. It must make a CON save (DC 14). On a failure, it becomes your Carrier for 1 hour — it spreads a 15 ft aura that gives enemies disadvantage on all rolls, and they take 2d10 Mud damage at the start of their turns. You are immune to your own plague. You must, once per day, sleep in wet mud for at least 1 hour. Failure results in you being unable to heal from any source for 15 days.

**Tier 5 (30 days):** You gain all Pasteur Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, any Carrier you create deals double Mud damage. When a Carrier deals Mud damage, roll d100 — on a 10 or higher, the damaged creature becomes a new Carrier. You must infect at least 400 living creatures with Mud Wrath before the pact ends. Failure results in death.

## Kepler
*Nova*

**Tier 1 (2 days):** You cannot be surprised. You have advantage on Initiative. Once per combat, you may reroll one d20. You must, once during the pact, spend 10 minutes observing the night sky and record at least 6 distinct points in a sketch. Failure results in Blurred for 2 days.

**Tier 2 (5 days):** Once per turn when you miss an attack, you may immediately make that same attack again against the same target. If it hits, it deals +3d10 Nova damage and applies Blinded (1 stack). You must, once per day, travel at least 1,000 ft in a fixed direction. Failure results in Demoralized for 5 days.

**Tier 3 (9 days):** Once per short rest, as an action, you may orbit around a point within 120 ft for 1 minute. You move clockwise around it (30 ft radius), your movement does not provoke reactions, and the first time each round you hit, you deal +4d10 Nova damage and apply Burned (1 stack). You must, by the end of the pact, produce an accurate map of a route you traveled. Failure results in Blinded for 9 days.

**Tier 4 (16 days):** Once per day, you may mark one creature as Inevitable for 1 minute. Your attacks against it ignore disadvantage, cannot miss (except natural 1), and deal +6d10 Nova damage. You must, once per day, correctly predict one concrete thing that will happen before your next long rest. Failure results in Despair for 16 days.

**Tier 5 (28 days):** You gain all Kepler Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, once per day, you may declare a Transit for 10 minutes — you and allies within 30 ft gain +20 ft speed and ignore difficult terrain. Your attacks deal +6d10 Nova damage and apply Blinded (1 stack) and Burned (1 stack). Kepler will give you a target to banish at the start of the pact — you must find and banish it. Each banishment gives you advantage on all rolls for 2 days. Failure results in your first turn of each combat being skipped and you start each combat Blurred and Demoralized for 28 days.

## Edison
*Solar*

**Tier 1 (2 days):** You shed bright light 15 ft and dim light 15 ft beyond. You are immune to the Blinded condition. You gain Resistance to Radiant damage. You must keep a non-magical flame burning on your person at all times during the pact. If it goes out, you fail. Failure results in Blinded for 2 days.

**Tier 2 (5 days):** At the start of combat, gain 3 Solar Charges. Once per turn when you deal damage, you may spend 1–3 Charges to add +2d10 Radiant damage per Charge. Charges refresh on a long rest. The flame requirement continues from Tier 1. Failure results in Burned (2 stacks) and Blinded at the start of each combat for 5 days.

**Tier 3 (10 days):** Once per day, as an action, create a 60 ft Solar Line (5 ft wide) within 60 ft for 10 minutes. Enemies that enter or start their turn there take 4d10 Radiant damage and gain Blinded (1 stack). Allies that cross it gain +20 ft movement. The flame requirement continues from Tier 1. Failure results in Mute and Deafened for 10 days.

**Tier 4 (16 days):** Once per day, for 1 minute, you become a Walking Sun: all your damage becomes Radiant, your Radiant damage ignores Resistance, enemies within 30 ft have disadvantage on attacks against you, and the first time each round you hit you add +6d10 Radiant damage and apply Burned (2 stacks). The flame requirement continues from Tier 1. Failure results in your magic items not functioning and you cannot use runes for 16 days.

**Tier 5 (30 days):** You gain all Edison Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, once per day, you may create a solar flare as an action (40 ft radius around you). Creatures must make a CON save (DC 15) or take 8d12 Radiant damage. Success halves damage. The flame requirement continues from Tier 1. You must, by the end of the pact, invent or create something new that advances knowledge or industry. Failure results in Demoralized at all times and you cannot gain advantage from any source for 30 days.

## Einstein
*Starlight*

**Tier 1 (2 days):** Once per round, you may move 10 ft as a free action immediately after any creature within 60 ft finishes its turn (movement does not provoke reactions). You must, once per day, spend 10 minutes observing a repeating motion. Failure results in Slowed for 2 days.

**Tier 2 (5 days):** Once per turn when you would take damage, you may reduce that damage instance to 1 and delay the prevented amount until the start of your next turn as Starlight damage (bypassing resistance). You must use this ability at least once per day. Failure results in Stunned (1 stack) at the start of each combat for 5 days.

**Tier 3 (10 days):** Once per day, as an action, create a 30 ft radius Relativity Field within 60 ft for 1 minute. Enemies' speed is halved, allies' speed is doubled. The first time each round an enemy moves willingly, it takes 3d10 Starlight damage and gains Stunned (1 stack). You must, once per day, end your turn in the exact same spot you started it in during combat. Failure results in your speed being halved and you lose all Reactions for 10 days.

**Tier 4 (16 days):** Once per day, you may freeze time for everyone except you for 1 round. During the frozen round, you may move, interact, drink potions, reposition creatures/objects, and set up effects, but you cannot deal damage or make attacks. After time resumes, your first hit within 1 minute deals +8d10 Starlight damage and applies Stunned (2 stacks). You must, once per day, let a hostile creature attack you before you attack it. Failure results in you being Stunned every other turn in combat for 16 days.

**Tier 5 (30 days):** You gain all Einstein Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, once per day, you may declare Two Turns for 1 minute — you take two full turns each round. You must not take the Dash or Disengage actions during the pact. Failure results in Slowed permanently during combat and you gain Stunned (1 stack) after every Action you take for 30 days.

## Boyle
*Vacuum*

**Tier 1 (3 days):** You are immune to Suffocating. As a bonus action, create a 5 ft vacuum pocket adjacent to you until your next turn. Creatures inside gain Mute. If they spend two turns inside, they gain Suffocating. You must, once per day, apply Suffocating to a creature. Failure results in Mute for 3 days.

**Tier 2 (5 days):** Once per turn, you make a ranged attack (60 ft) that deals 4d10 Vacuum damage. On hit, the target is pulled 10 ft toward you or pushed 10 ft away. You must kill at least 1 creature per day with Vacuum damage. Failure results in Suffocating for the first 3 rounds of each combat for 5 days.

**Tier 3 (9 days):** Once per short rest, as an action, create a 30 ft radius Vacuum Zone within 60 ft for 1 minute. Creatures inside take 3d10 Vacuum damage at the start of their turns and gain Suffocating and Mute. You must kill at least 1 creature by Suffocation each day. Failure results in Mute and you cannot benefit from healing magic for 9 days.

**Tier 4 (16 days):** As an action, erase the air in a 20 ft radius within 60 ft for 10 minutes. Creatures inside take 3d10 Vacuum damage at the start of their turns and gain Suffocating and Mute for 3 turns. Creatures within 5 ft must make a STR save (DC 14) or be pulled to the center, taking 1d8 Bludgeoning damage. You must, once per day, willingly enter your own airless area. Failure results in you taking 1d10 Vacuum damage at the start of each turn for 16 days.

**Tier 5 (30 days):** You gain all Boyle Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, once per day, choose one creature within 60 ft — for 1 minute it gains Mute and Suffocating and takes 6d10 Vacuum damage at the start of each of its turns (no save). You must, by the end of the pact, kill at least 200 creatures with INT 6+ using Vacuum damage or Suffocation. Failure results in Slowed permanently and taking 3d10 Vacuum damage at the start of each turn in combat for 30 days.

## Lorenz
*Chaos*

**Tier 1 (2 days):** You gain Resistance to Chaos damage. Once per day, you may declare a single d20 roll to have been a natural 1 or natural 20 after seeing the result (you choose which). You must, once per day, make a decision by rolling a die (a coin, a die, any random method) and abide by the result. Failure results in all your d20 rolls being made with disadvantage for 2 days.

**Tier 2 (4 days):** At the start of each combat, roll 1d4 and gain a minor random benefit for that combat:
  - 1: Your speed is doubled.
  - 2: Your first attack each round deals +2d10 Chaos damage.
  - 3: You have advantage on all saves.
  - 4: You regain 1d10 Vitality at the start of each of your turns.
You must, once per day, change your plan at the last minute based on a random outcome. Failure results in you being unable to benefit from any buffs or positive effects for 4 days (your luck runs cold).

**Tier 3 (8 days):** Once per short rest, as an action, you create a 40 ft radius Probability Storm for 1 minute. At the start of each of their turns, non-allied creatures must roll 1d20. On a 1-5, they are Stunned for that turn. On a 16-20, they are Hasted for that turn (you decide the effect ranges each time you use this). You must, once per day, let chance decide an important outcome (GM decides if it was important enough). Failure results in you rolling 1d20 at the start of each of your turns — on a 1-5, you lose your turn; on a 16-20, you gain an extra action.

**Tier 4 (14 days):** Once per long rest, as an action, you create 1d4+1 illusory copies of yourself. Each copy has 100 HP, AC 25, and deals 3d10 Chaos damage with attacks. Copies are indistinguishable from you. When a copy is destroyed, you gain 10 temporary Mana. You must, before the end of the pact, cause a significant unpredictable change in your life or surroundings (quit a job, move homes, end a relationship, start a feud). Failure results in you being unable to take more than one action per turn for 14 days.

**Tier 5 (28 days):** You gain all Lorenz Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, once per day, you may force the entire combat to reroll initiative. All ongoing effects, conditions, and buffs are cancelled. All creatures reset to their starting positions with their current HP. You must, by the end of the pact, never hold the same opinion or follow the same routine for more than 7 consecutive days — change something fundamental about your approach each week. Failure results in permanent predictability: you lose your Reactions, have disadvantage on all saves, and can be predicted by any divination effect.

## Turing
*Warp*

**Tier 1 (2 days):** You have advantage on INT checks. Once per combat, you may teleport 15 ft to a space you can see as a bonus action. You must, once per day, teleport at least 6 times (any distance). Failure results in Stunned (1 stack) at the start of each combat for 2 days.

**Tier 2 (4 days):** Once per turn, you may teleport 20 ft as a bonus action. The first attack you make after teleporting deals +3d10 Warp damage. You must, each day, speak exactly 30 words total between sunrise and your next long rest (you may write the rest). Failure results in Demoralized for 4 days.

**Tier 3 (8 days):** Once per day, you may Fork yourself for 1 minute. At the start of each of your turns, create an illusory duplicate in an adjacent space. The duplicate can take one action or bonus action each round but cannot deal damage directly (it can shove, grapple, help, interact, administer potions). If hit, it vanishes. You must, once per day, end your turn in the exact same spot you started it in. Failure results in you being unable to take bonus actions or reactions for 8 days.

**Tier 4 (14 days):** Once per day, as an action, you may fold space, teleporting yourself and up to 3 allies to any location you can see within 300 ft. Enemies within 20 ft of the departure and arrival points take 6d10 Warp damage. You must, once per day, take exactly 10 ft of movement total across an entire combat. Failure results in Stunned (1 stack) and Demoralized at the start of each combat for 14 days.

**Tier 5 (28 days):** You gain all Turing Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, once per day, you may rewind a round during combat (or 6 seconds outside). Everything is undone but you remember what happened. You must, by the end of the pact, take exactly 1 action per turn (no bonus, no reaction) for 10 total turns across the pact. Failure results in you losing your first two turns of each combat for 28 days.

## Richter
*Quake*

**Tier 1 (2 days):** You gain Resistance to Quake and Earth damage and immunity to Prone. Once per turn when you hit, you deal +1d10 Quake damage. You must, once per day, knock a creature Prone. Failure results in Prone at the start of each combat for 2 days.

**Tier 2 (4 days):** You may convert any physical or elemental damage you deal into Quake damage. Once per turn when you deal Quake damage, the target must make a CON save (DC 13) or gain Deafened (2 stacks) and Prone. You must, once per day, end your turn on bare stone or earth. Failure results in Deafened (2 stacks) at the start of each combat for 4 days.

**Tier 3 (8 days):** Once per short rest, as an action, you split the ground in a 60 ft line (5 ft wide). Creatures on it must make a DEX save (DC 14) or take 6d10 Quake damage and gain Prone. You must, once per day, take at least 20 damage from a single source. Failure results in Prone the first time you take damage each turn for 8 days.

**Tier 4 (14 days):** Once per day, for 1 minute, you create a 60 ft radius Unstable Zone. Enemies inside treat it as difficult terrain, cannot Dash, and take 3d10 Quake damage at the start of their turns. You must, once every 4 days, spend 3 consecutive turns without moving any distance. Failure results in Prone and Deafened at the start of each combat for 14 days.

**Tier 5 (28 days):** You gain all Richter Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, once per day, as an action, you cause a catastrophic tremor — all creatures of your choice within 120 ft take 8d10 Quake damage and gain Prone (3 stacks). You must, by the end of the pact, apply Deafened to at least 40 unique creatures. Failure results in Prone, Deafened, and Stunned at the start of each combat for 28 days.

## Hawking
*Void*

**Tier 1 (3 days):** You gain Resistance to Void damage and immunity to Suffocating. Once per day, as a bonus action, you make your body weightless until the end of your turn — your movement does not provoke reactions. You must, once per day, spend 10 minutes in complete silence. Failure results in Frozen (2 stacks) and Suffocating at the start of each combat for 3 days.

**Tier 2 (6 days):** When you deal damage, you may change its type to Void. The first time each combat you deal Void damage to a creature, it gains Frozen (2 stacks) and Suffocating (2 stacks). You must kill at least 5 humanoid creatures with Void damage during the pact. Failure results in Frozen (3 stacks) and Suffocating at the start of each combat for 6 days.

**Tier 3 (12 days):** Once per day, as an action, create a 30 ft radius Void Pocket within 60 ft for 1 minute. Enemies inside have halved movement. The first time each round they take an action, they take 3d10 Void damage. The area counts as magical darkness you can see through. You must start at least 10 combats during the pact without speaking a word or casting a spell in the first 3 rounds. Failure results in Frozen (4 stacks) and Suffocating at the start of each combat for 12 days.

**Tier 4 (18 days):** Once per short rest, as an action, choose one creature within 60 ft. It must make a CON save (DC 14). On a failure, it becomes airless for 1 minute — Suffocating immediately, and taking 4d10 Void damage at the start of each of its turns. You must successfully apply this at least once per day. Failure results in Frozen (5 stacks) and Suffocating at the start of each combat for 18 days.

**Tier 5 (35 days):** You gain all Hawking Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, once per day, as an action, you create a black hole (30 ft radius) within 120 ft. It shrinks by 5 ft each turn. Creatures within 100 ft must make a STR save or be pulled 10 ft closer. Creatures inside take 100 True damage at the start of each turn and are Petrified. You must kill at least 350 creatures with your black hole during the pact. Failure results in death — the void consumes you and you cannot be resurrected.

## Oppenheimer
*Atomic*

**Tier 1 (2 days):** You gain Resistance to Atomic, Fire, and Radiant damage. Once per day, as an action, deal 4d10 Atomic damage to a creature you touch. You must, once per day, willingly take at least 10 damage from a single instance. Failure results in Radiation (1 stack) for 2 days.

**Tier 2 (5 days):** Once per combat, you may Prime a creature within 120 ft. The next time it takes damage (within 1 minute), it takes an additional 6d10 Atomic damage and gains Radiation (1 stack). You must, once per day, deal Atomic damage and then not heal yourself for 1 hour. Failure results in Radiation (2 stacks) for 5 days.

**Tier 3 (9 days):** When you kill a creature, it detonates — enemies within 20 ft take 6d10 Atomic damage and gain Radiation (1 stack). You are immune to your own detonation. You must, once per day, end your turn adjacent to a creature with Radiation for at least 3 total turns that day. Failure results in you radiating — creatures within 10 ft take 1d10 Atomic damage at the start of each turn for 9 days, and you permanently have Radiation.

**Tier 4 (16 days):** Once per combat, as an action, create a 40 ft radius blast within 200 ft. Enemies take 10d10 Atomic damage and gain Radiation (2 stacks). You take 5d10 Atomic damage. You must kill at least 50 creatures with Atomic damage during the pact. Failure results in permanent Radiation (3 stacks).

**Tier 5 (30 days):** You gain all Oppenheimer Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, once per day, as an action, you may unleash a true detonation at a point within 200 ft — 80 ft radius, 20d10 Atomic damage, and all hit gain Radiation (4 stacks). You must, by the end of the pact, kill at least 1,000 creatures. Failure results in permanent Radiation (5 stacks) that cannot be removed by any means.



========================================================================
  MARKDOWN: Eyum TTRPG/5.0 Deities (WIP)/Fiendish Pacts.md
========================================================================

Fiends typically want to spread chaos and death, typically by the means of their type of damage. They gain power from people fearing their Affinity. Fiends punishments are usually very severe.

> For condition references see [[2.4 Conditions]]. For damage type references see [[2.2 Damage Types]].

## Black Mercy
*Necrotic, Evil Alignment*

**Tier 1 (2 days):** You gain Resistance to Necrotic damage. Once per turn when you damage a creature, you may convert that damage to Necrotic. If you do, you heal for 1d10 Vitality. You must, today, witness a death or kill a living creature yourself. Failure results in Slow Death (3 stacks) that cannot be removed for 3 days.

**Tier 2 (5 days):** Once per short rest, as an action, you unleash a 30 ft cone of necrotic energy. Creatures must make a CON save (DC 14) or take 4d10 Necrotic damage directly to their Health (bypassing Vitality). You heal for half the damage dealt. You must, before the end of the pact, personally attend a funeral or death rite and speak the deceased's name aloud. Failure results in you being unable to regain Health for 7 days.

**Tier 3 (9 days):** Once per long rest, as a bonus action, you may Mark one creature within 60 ft for death. For 1 minute, that creature has disadvantage on all saves, cannot regain HP, and all damage you deal to it goes directly to Health (bypassing Vitality). You must kill at least 10 humanoid creatures during the pact period. Failure results in the Cursed condition and Despair for 14 days.

**Tier 4 (15 days):** Once per long rest, as an action, you may declare an Embrace of Mercy in a 40 ft radius. All non-deity creatures must make a CON save (DC 15) or be reduced to 0 Health instantly. Creatures below 25% Vitality automatically fail. Those who succeed take 5d10 Necrotic damage. You must kill at least 50 humanoid creatures during the pact period. Failure results in permanent Slow Death (5 stacks) and you cannot be healed by any means for 30 days.

**Tier 5 (30 days):** You gain all Black Mercy Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, once per day, as an action, you may drain the life from all creatures in a 60 ft radius. Each must make a CON save (DC 16) or take 10d10 Necrotic damage to Health. You heal for all damage dealt this way. You must kill at least 200 humanoid creatures before the pact ends. Failure results in permanent death. You cannot be revived by any means.

## Red Furnace
*Magma, Neutral Alignment*

**Tier 1 (1 day):** You gain Resistance to Magma and Fire damage. You leave a trail of molten rock wherever you walk. Creatures that end their turn adjacent to you take 1d10 Magma damage. You must, today, destroy or melt something made of stone or metal. Failure results in On Fire (5 stacks) that cannot be removed for 2 days.

**Tier 2 (3 days):** Once per short rest, as an action, you spew a 40 ft cone of magma. Creatures must make a DEX save (DC 13) or take 4d10 Magma damage and be Restrained as the magma cools. Those who succeed take half damage. You must, once per day, destroy a structure or object of value (a wall, a door, a piece of furniture worth 10+ Gold). Failure results in you being Restrained for 3 turns at the start of each combat for 5 days.

**Tier 3 (7 days):** Your body radiates intense heat. Melee attackers take 3d10 Magma damage. You are immune to Fire damage. You leave a trail of molten rock that persists for 1 minute, dealing 2d10 Magma damage to creatures that cross it. You must, by the end of the pact, raze a building or settlement structure. Failure results in permanent On Fire (3 stacks) that cannot be removed and deals damage each hour for 14 days.

**Tier 4 (12 days):** Once per long rest, as an action, you cause the ground to erupt in a 60 ft radius around you. Creatures must make a DEX save (DC 15) or take 10d10 Magma damage and gain On Fire (5 stacks). The area becomes difficult terrain for the rest of combat. You must, by the end of the pact, kill at least 30 creatures with Magma or Fire damage. Failure results in permanent Slow Death (5 stacks) and half movement speed for 30 days.

**Tier 5 (25 days):** You gain all Red Furnace Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, once per day, as an action, you may unleash a volcanic eruption in a 100 ft radius centered on yourself. Creatures must make a DEX save (DC 16) or take 15d10 Magma damage and gain On Fire (10 stacks). The area becomes molten wasteland for the rest of combat. You must, by the end of the pact, destroy a city block or equivalent large structure. Failure results in permanent death. You cannot be revived by any means.

## Knotted Word
*Cursed, Evil Alignment*

**Tier 1 (2 days):** You gain Resistance to Cursed damage. Once per turn when you hit a creature, you may apply Cursed to it for 1 minute. You must, today, make someone promise you something in writing. Failure results in you being Cursed for 4 days.

**Tier 2 (5 days):** Once per turn, as a Reaction when a creature within 60 ft rolls a d20, you may force it to reroll and use the lower result. If the reroll is lower, that creature also becomes Cursed for 1 minute. You must, once per day, trick someone into agreeing to something they did not fully understand. Failure results in you being Cursed and unable to benefit from advantage for 7 days.

**Tier 3 (9 days):** Once per short rest, as an action, you create a 30 ft radius Contract Zone for 1 minute. Enemies inside cannot benefit from advantage. The first time each round an enemy inside rolls a d20, it takes 3d10 Cursed damage to its HP. You must, before the end of the pact, bind at least 5 creatures with a verbal or written contract. Failure results in Despair for 10 days and all your contracts or promises being automatically broken.

**Tier 4 (15 days):** All your attacks apply the Cursed condition for 1 turn. When a Cursed creature within 60 ft takes an Action, you may spend a Reaction to cancel that Action (it does nothing). You must, before the end of the pact, make at least 20 creatures sign or agree to something that disadvantages them. Failure results in you losing your first Action each combat for 20 days.

**Tier 5 (30 days):** You gain all Knotted Word Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, once per day, as an action, choose one creature within 60 ft. It cannot take Actions, Bonus Actions, or Reactions for 3 turns. At the start of each of its turns it takes 6d10 Cursed damage to its HP. You must, before the pact ends, kill at least 100 creatures and apply Cursed at least 200 times. Failure results in permanent death. You cannot be revived by any means.

## Pale Cinder
*Ash, Evil Alignment*

**Tier 1 (2 days):** You gain Resistance to Ash damage. When you deal damage, you may convert it to Ash damage. Creatures you damage with Ash become Blurred for 1 turn. You must, today, let something burn to ash (a piece of paper, wood, cloth). Failure results in you being Blurred for 3 days.

**Tier 2 (4 days):** Once per short rest, as an action, you create a 30 ft radius Ash Cloud within 60 ft for 1 minute. Creatures inside have disadvantage on attack rolls and search/spot checks. The first time each round an enemy inside takes damage, it takes an additional 2d10 Ash damage. You must, once per day, extinguish a light source or cause darkness in an area. Failure results in you being Blinded for 5 days.

**Tier 3 (8 days):** When a creature's On Fire condition ends within 60 ft of you, you may use the remaining ash. As a bonus action: gain +2 AC until your next turn; or deal 2d10 Ash damage to a creature within 30 ft; or heal 1d10 Vitality. You may keep this ash for up to 3 turns. You must, before the end of the pact, kill at least 10 creatures with Ash or Fire damage. Failure results in you being unable to take Reactions for 14 days.

**Tier 4 (14 days):** Once per long rest, as an action, you may cover the sky in ash in a 120 ft radius for 3 turns. During this time: enemies cannot regain HP and take 3d10 Ash damage to HP at the start of their turns; all light counts as dim or darkness; you are constantly in stealth while more than 15 ft from enemies. You must, before the end of the pact, have at least 40 creatures witness your use of this ability. Failure results in you taking 2d10 Ash damage at the start of each of your turns in combat for 20 days.

**Tier 5 (28 days):** You gain all Pale Cinder Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, once per day, as an action, you create an Ashfall in a 60 ft radius within 120 ft for 3 turns. Enemies inside take 6d10 Ash damage to HP at the start of their turns, gain the Suffocating condition, and have movement halved. You must deal at least 600 total Ash damage during the pact. Failure results in permanent death. You cannot be revived by any means.

## Wither Bloom
*Blight, Evil Alignment*

**Tier 1 (2 days):** You gain Resistance to Blight damage. When you deal damage, you may convert it to Blight damage. Creatures you damage become Withered (1 stack). You must, today, let something organic rot or decay (food, a plant, a corpse). Failure results in you being Withered for 4 days.

**Tier 2 (5 days):** Once per short rest, as a bonus action, choose one creature within 60 ft. Until the end of your next turn, the first time it takes damage it also takes 3d10 Blight damage. You must kill at least 1 creature from the Withered condition during the pact. Failure results in you being Withered for 7 days and unable to regain Vitality.

**Tier 3 (9 days):** Once per short rest, as an action, you create a 30 ft radius Rot Field within 60 ft for 1 minute. Enemies inside take 3d10 Blight damage at the start of their turns and have disadvantage on saving throws. You must deal at least 200 total Blight damage during the pact. Failure results in you being unable to regain Vitality by any means for 14 days.

**Tier 4 (15 days):** When you deal damage, you may convert it to Blight. Once per combat, as a Reaction when a creature within 60 ft regains Vitality, you may negate that regain and deal 4d10 Blight damage to its HP instead. You must kill at least 5 creatures from the Withered condition during the pact. Failure results in permanent loss of half your maximum Vitality.

**Tier 5 (30 days):** You gain all Wither Bloom Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, once per day, as an action, choose up to 3 creatures within 60 ft. They gain Withered immediately and take 6d10 Blight damage. You must apply Withered to at least 60 creatures and have at least 30 die from the condition during the pact. Failure results in permanent death. You cannot be revived by any means.

## Serpent's Kiss
*Poison, Neutral Alignment*

**Tier 1 (1 day):** You gain Resistance to Poison damage. Your melee attacks apply Poisoned (1 stack) on hit. You must, today, poison something (food, drink, a weapon tip). Failure results in you being Poisoned for 3 days.

**Tier 2 (3 days):** Once per short rest, as a bonus action, you may blow a 20 ft cone of venom. Creatures must make a CON save (DC 14) or gain Poisoned (2 stacks) and take 3d10 Poison damage. You must, once per day, get someone to trust you while you have ulterior motives. Failure results in you being Poisoned (4 stacks) for 5 days.

**Tier 3 (7 days):** Once per long rest, as an action, you create a 20 ft radius Venom Ring within 60 ft for 1 minute. Enemies that start their turn in the ring take 3d10 Poison damage and gain Poisoned. If they are already Poisoned, they take an additional 2d10 Poison damage to HP. You must deal at least 250 total Poison damage during the pact. Failure results in permanent -2 to all saving throws and attack rolls.

**Tier 4 (12 days):** Once per combat, for 3 turns, whenever a creature within 30 ft would remove Poisoned, it fails and instead takes 4d10 Poison damage and gains Poisoned for another turn. You must kill at least 1 humanoid creature per day by Poison damage during the pact. Failure results in you being permanently Poisoned and gaining Greater Weakness to Poison.

**Tier 5 (25 days):** You gain all Serpent's Kiss Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, once per day, as an action, choose one creature within 60 ft. It gains Poisoned (6 stacks) with no save. You must poison at least 300 unique humanoid creatures during the pact. Failure results in permanent death. You cannot be revived by any means.

## Lung Spore
*Toxin, Evil Alignment*

**Tier 1 (2 days):** You gain Resistance to Toxin damage. When you miss an attack against a creature, it must make a CON save (DC 11) or take 2d10 Toxin damage. You must, today, infect someone with a disease or make someone sick (a lie about contamination counts). Failure results in you being Suffocating for 3 days.

**Tier 2 (4 days):** Once per short rest, as a bonus action, you exhale a 20 ft cone of spores. Creatures must make a CON save (DC 14) or gain Poisoned and Mute for 1 turn and take 3d10 Toxin damage. You must kill at least 3 humanoid creatures with Toxin damage during the pact. Failure results in you being Mute for 7 days.

**Tier 3 (8 days):** Once per short rest, as an action, you create a 30 ft radius Spore Fog within 60 ft for 1 minute. Enemies inside have disadvantage on attack rolls and saving throws. At the start of their turns, they take 3d10 Toxin damage to HP. You must kill at least 7 creatures with Toxin damage during the pact. Failure results in you being Poisoned (3 stacks) at all times for 14 days.

**Tier 4 (14 days):** As an action, choose one creature within 60 ft. It must make a CON save (DC 15) or gain Suffocating and Poisoned for 3 turns and take 4d10 Toxin damage. You must kill at least 12 humanoid creatures with Toxin damage during the pact. Failure results in you starting each combat Suffocating for 3 turns for 20 days.

**Tier 5 (28 days):** You gain all Lung Spore Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, once per day, as an action, you create a 60 ft radius Dead Air within 120 ft for 3 turns. Enemies inside gain Suffocating and take 6d10 Toxin damage to HP at the start of their turns. You must kill at least 40 humanoid creatures during the pact. Failure results in permanent death. You cannot be revived by any means.

## Shuddering Idol
*Tremor, Neutral Alignment*

**Tier 1 (1 day):** You gain Resistance to Tremor and Quake damage. Once per turn when you hit a creature, you may knock it Prone if it is your size or smaller. You must, today, make someone flinch or show fear. Failure results in you being knocked Prone at the start of each combat for 2 days.

**Tier 2 (3 days):** Once per short rest, as an action, you stomp the ground. Creatures in a 40 ft radius must make a DEX save (DC 13) or be knocked Prone and take 3d10 Tremor damage. You must, once per day, spread fear or panic in a public place. Failure results in you being unable to stand after being knocked Prone for 3 days (you must spend your full turn standing).

**Tier 3 (6 days):** You gain DR 20 against all physical damage. You cannot be knocked Prone or moved by any effect. Your footsteps cause the ground to shake — creatures within 20 ft must make a DEX save (DC 13) at the start of their turns or fall Prone. You must, by the end of the pact, make at least 20 creatures flee from you in fear. Failure results in you being Vulnerable to all physical damage for 10 days.

**Tier 4 (12 days):** Once per long rest, as an action, you slam the ground. Creatures in a 60 ft radius must make a DEX save (DC 15) or take 8d10 Tremor damage and be knocked Prone. Structures in the area take double damage. You must, by the end of the pact, cause a structure to collapse or be severely damaged. Failure results in you being Stunned for 1 turn at the start of each combat for 15 days.

**Tier 5 (24 days):** You gain all Shuddering Idol Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, once per day, as an action, you make a Seismic Strike against a creature within reach. The target takes 12d10 Tremor damage and all creatures within a 40 ft line behind it must make a DEX save (DC 16) or take the same damage. You must, by the end of the pact, cause a panic event that affects at least 100 people. Failure results in permanent death. You cannot be revived by any means.

## Drowned Prophet
*Deluge, Neutral Alignment*

**Tier 1 (2 days):** You gain Resistance to Deluge and Water damage. Water pools around you in a 15 ft radius, becoming 1 ft deep. The area counts as difficult terrain for others; you move through it freely. You must, today, predict a disaster (weather, social, personal) and be correct. Failure results in you being unable to breathe water and Suffocating for 1 turn each hour for 3 days.

**Tier 2 (4 days):** Once per short rest, as an action, you unleash a 60 ft line of rushing water (20 ft wide). Creatures must make a STR save (DC 13) or be pushed 60 ft and take 4d10 Deluge damage. You must, once per day, warn someone of a coming catastrophe and be taken seriously. Failure results in you being unable to speak for 5 days.

**Tier 3 (8 days):** You can breathe underwater and ignore the effects of deep water pressure. Once per turn, when a creature within 60 ft speaks, you may force it to make a WIS save (DC 13) or spend its action coughing up water. You must, by the end of the pact, survive a flood, storm, or similar disaster. Failure results in you being unable to hold your breath (immediately Suffocating in water) for 10 days.

**Tier 4 (14 days):** Once per long rest, as an action, you summon a 100 ft line of torrential water (30 ft wide) that surges forward. Creatures must make a STR save (DC 15) or take 8d10 Deluge damage and be pushed 100 ft. You must, by the end of the pact, convert at least 10 people to a doomsday or catastrophe cult. Failure results in you being unable to breathe air (treat all air as water) for 15 days.

**Tier 5 (28 days):** You gain all Drowned Prophet Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, once per day, as an action, you summon a storm in a 1-mile radius for 1 hour. Torrential rain falls. Visibility is 30 ft, ranged attacks have disadvantage, and exposed enemies take 3d10 Deluge damage at the start of their turns. You must, by the end of the pact, drown or flood a settlement. Failure results in permanent death. You cannot be revived by any means.

## Screaming Hymn
*Shatter, Evil Alignment*

**Tier 1 (1 day):** You gain Resistance to Shatter and Thunder damage. Your voice deals 1d10 Shatter damage to all creatures within 15 ft whenever you speak (you may whisper to avoid this). You must, today, make an unnecessary loud noise in a quiet place. Failure results in you being Deafened for 2 days.

**Tier 2 (3 days):** Each time you deal damage, you apply 1 Resonance stack (max 3 per target). At Resonance 3, the target takes an additional 3d10 Shatter damage and has its resistances reduced by one tier for 1 turn. You must, once per day, break something valuable in public. Failure results in you being unable to deal damage for the first 2 rounds of each combat for 4 days.

**Tier 3 (6 days):** Once per short rest, as an action, you unleash a 60 ft cone of sonic force. Creatures must make a CON save (DC 14) or take 6d10 Shatter damage, be Deafened for 2 turns, and lose concentration. Those who succeed take half damage. You must, by the end of the pact, destroy at least 20 objects (furniture, walls, equipment). Failure results in you being Deafened at all times for 10 days.

**Tier 4 (12 days):** Once per long rest, as an action, you scream continuously for 1 turn. All creatures in a 100 ft radius must make a CON save (DC 15) at the start of each of their turns or take 6d10 Shatter damage. Structures and objects in the area are destroyed at the end of the turn. You must, by the end of the pact, incite a riot or mob that causes property damage. Failure results in you being unable to speak or cast spells with verbal components for 15 days.

**Tier 5 (25 days):** You gain all Screaming Hymn Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, once per day, as an action, you release a 200 ft cone of pure sound. Creatures must make a CON save (DC 16) or take 12d10 Shatter damage, be Deafened for 5 turns, and have any concentration broken. Structures are destroyed. You must, by the end of the pact, bring down a major structure (castle, temple, fortress) with your voice. Failure results in permanent death. You cannot be revived by any means.

## Weeping Star
*Sorrow, Neutral Alignment*

**Tier 1 (2 days):** You gain Resistance to Sorrow and Psychic damage. Creatures within 20 ft of you have disadvantage on attack rolls against you. You must, today, make someone cry or feel deep sadness. Failure results in you being unable to take Actions for 1 turn each hour for 3 days.

**Tier 2 (4 days):** Once per short rest, as an action, you release a 60 ft cone of sorrow. Creatures must make a WIS save (DC 13) or take 4d10 Sorrow damage and be Stunned with grief for 1 turn. You must, once per day, dwell on a personal loss or failure for at least 10 minutes. Failure results in you being Stunned for 1 turn at the start of each combat for 5 days.

**Tier 3 (8 days):** Whenever a creature dies within 300 ft of you, you regain 20 Mana and 50 Vitality. You can feel each death distinctly and know the direction. You must, by the end of the pact, attend at least 3 funerals or deathbeds. Failure results in you being unable to regain Mana for 10 days.

**Tier 4 (14 days):** Once per long rest, as an action, you sing a song of loss. All non-deity creatures in a 100 ft radius must make a CON save (DC 15) or be reduced to 1 HP and Incapacitated for 1 turn. Those who succeed take 6d10 Sorrow damage. You must, by the end of the pact, make at least 10 people convert to a grief cult or mourning practice. Failure results in you being reduced to 1 HP at the start of each day for 15 days (this cannot kill you but leaves you vulnerable).

**Tier 5 (28 days):** You gain all Weeping Star Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, once per day, as an action, you flood a 200 ft radius with magically conjured salt water (difficult terrain). Creatures in the water take 4d10 Sorrow damage at the start of their turns. You may, as a bonus action, summon the spirits of the dead within 1 mile to fight for you (each has 50 HP and deals 2d10 Sorrow damage). You must, by the end of the pact, cause at least 50 deaths through grief, despair, or your direct actions. Failure results in permanent death. You cannot be revived by any means.

## Iron Pit
*Infernal, Evil Alignment*

**Tier 1 (3 days):** You gain Resistance to Infernal damage. Creatures within 30 ft that attempt to attack you must make a WIS save (DC 12) or lose their action (frozen in fear). This does not work on creatures with Godslayer levels. You must, once per day, give a command to someone weaker and expect obedience. Failure results in you being Frightened of the next creature that challenges you for 3 days.

**Tier 2 (6 days):** You gain 50 temporary armor at the start of each combat. While you have any armor remaining, all damage you take is reduced by 25%. You must, once per day, punish someone who disobeyed you or defied a rule. Failure results in your armor being 0 and you taking double damage for 6 days.

**Tier 3 (10 days):** Once per short rest, as an action, you may bind one creature within 60 ft in infernal chains. It must make a STR save (DC 14) or be Restrained, taking 4d10 Infernal damage each turn until it escapes (DC 15 STR check as an action). You must, by the end of the pact, establish a hierarchy where at least 3 people answer to you. Failure results in you being Restrained at the start of each combat for 12 days.

**Tier 4 (16 days):** Once per long rest, as an action, you create a 60 ft radius Punishment Zone centered on yourself for 1 minute. You designate one action type per turn (as a free action). Creatures inside that take that action take 6d10 Infernal damage to their Health and lose the action. You must, by the end of the pact, have at least 20 creatures publicly submit to your authority. Failure results in you being unable to take Actions of your choice (GM picks) for 20 days.

**Tier 5 (30 days):** You gain all Iron Pit Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, once per day, as an action, you open a 30 ft radius portal to the Infernal Realm within 120 ft that lasts 1 minute. Creatures within 50 ft must make a STR save (DC 16) or be pulled toward it. Creatures pulled in are sent to Hell and must find their own way back. You must, by the end of the pact, send at least 10 creatures to Hell through your portal. Failure results in permanent death and your soul being claimed by Iron Pit.

## Black Mirror
*Obsidian*

**Tier 1 (2 days):** You gain Resistance to Obsidian damage. Any spell or projectile that targets you has a 10% chance to reflect back at the caster. You must, today, keep a secret that would benefit you to reveal. Failure results in you being unable to hide or use Stealth for 3 days.

**Tier 2 (4 days):** Once per short rest, as an action, you fire a razor-sharp obsidian shard at a target within 120 ft. The target takes 4d10 Obsidian damage and must make a CON save (DC 13) or bleed for 2d10 damage at the start of its turns for 2 turns. You must, once per day, destroy a record or document that contains information about someone. Failure results in you bleeding for 2d10 damage at the start of each combat for 5 days.

**Tier 3 (8 days):** When you take damage that would reduce you to 0 HP, you may instead shatter into 1d4 obsidian shards. Each shard has 50 HP and attacks for 2d10 Obsidian damage. If any shard survives until your next turn, you reform from it. You may do this once per long rest. You must, by the end of the pact, erase all evidence of a significant event or person. Failure results in you being unable to reform (permanent death on reaching 0 HP) for 14 days.

**Tier 4 (14 days):** Once per long rest, as an action, you create a 60 ft radius dome of reflective obsidian for 3 turns. Inside, all creatures see distorted reflections and must make a WIS save (DC 14) at the start of their turns or be Confused for that turn. You are immune. You must, by the end of the pact, make at least 5 people forget something important or believe a false memory. Failure results in you being Confused at the start of each combat for 15 days.

**Tier 5 (28 days):** You gain all Black Mirror Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, once per day, as an action, you may permanently erase one creature's name from all records, including the memories of everyone who knows it. The creature becomes a nameless entity that cannot form pacts, receive blessings, or be targeted by name-based effects (WIS save to resist). You must, by the end of the pact, delete at least 3 major historical records or important pieces of knowledge from the world. Failure results in your own name being erased from existence — no one remembers you and you cannot be revived.

## Eternal Stain
*Corruption, Evil Alignment*

**Tier 1 (3 days):** You gain Resistance to Corruption damage. Once per day, as a bonus action, you may apply Corrupt (1 stack) to a creature within 60 ft (no save). You must, once per day, convince someone to do something slightly wrong (tell a small lie, break a minor rule). Failure results in you being Corrupted (1 stack) for 5 days.

**Tier 2 (6 days):** Once per short rest, as an action, choose one creature within 60 ft. It must make a WIS save (DC 13) or become Diplomatic toward you for 1 minute. While Diplomatic, it cannot attack you, considers you a trusted ally, and will follow reasonable suggestions. Damage breaks this effect. You must, before the end of the pact, corrupt at least one institution or organization (guild, temple, government office). Failure results in all social checks against you having disadvantage for 8 days.

**Tier 3 (10 days):** At the start of each of your turns, all creatures within 40 ft gain Corrupt (1 stack, no save). At Corrupt 5, the creature becomes fully corrupted and follows your commands for 1 minute (WIS save to resist each command). You must, by the end of the pact, convert at least 5 people to serve you or your cause through corruption. Failure results in you being Corrupted (3 stacks) permanently and unable to be cleansed for 14 days.

**Tier 4 (16 days):** All structures, magical barriers, and constructs within 120 ft of you are weakened. Magical barriers lose 25% HP. Non-magical structures take damage each hour. You may, as an action, cause a 60 ft radius area to rot: creatures take 4d10 Corruption damage and magical items must make a CON save or lose one enchantment. You must, by the end of the pact, bring down a major institution (a government, a church, a trade guild). Failure results in all your equipment becoming nonmagical for 30 days and you being Corrupted (5 stacks).

**Tier 5 (30 days):** You gain all Eternal Stain Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, once per day, as an action, choose one creature or object within 200 ft. It ages 1,000 years. Creatures age to dust (instant death unless immortal, no save). Objects crumble. You may use this against a deity to age them 100 years (reducing their Divine Level by 1 permanently). You must, by the end of the pact, corrupt an entire settlement or region. Failure results in permanent death and your soul being consumed by Eternal Stain.

## Breath of Ruin
*Miasma, Evil Alignment*

**Tier 1 (3 days):** You gain Resistance to Miasma damage. Creatures within 30 ft of you have disadvantage on all attack rolls. This is not a magical effect and cannot be dispelled. You must, today, convince someone to give up on a goal or hope. Failure results in you having disadvantage on all attack rolls for 4 days.

**Tier 2 (5 days):** Creatures within 40 ft of you gain 1 stack of Exhaustion at the start of their turns (no save). At 3 Exhaustion, the creature is Slowed. Exhaustion from this source cannot be removed while within 40 ft. You must, once per day, cause someone to fail at something important. Failure results in you gaining Exhaustion (2 stacks) that cannot be removed for 6 days.

**Tier 3 (9 days):** Once per short rest, as an action, you unleash an 80 ft cone of soul-draining miasma. Creatures must make a CON save (DC 14) or take 6d10 Miasma damage and lose all temporary buffs, which you gain as healing. You must, by the end of the pact, make at least 10 people abandon their homes, jobs, or communities. Failure results in you being unable to benefit from any buffs or positive effects for 12 days.

**Tier 4 (15 days):** Once per long rest, as an action, you create a 120 ft radius Field of Failure for 1 minute. Creatures in the area must roll all d20s twice and take the lower result. This bypasses advantage (roll three times, take lowest). You must, by the end of the pact, cause a community to collapse (economic, social, or structural). Failure results in you rolling all d20s with disadvantage for 20 days.

**Tier 5 (30 days):** You gain all Breath of Ruin Tier 1–4 benefits while this pact is active. In addition, once per day, as an action, you emit a 200 ft radius wave of pure despair. All non-deity creatures must make a WIS save (DC 16) or be affected by Despair that cannot be removed for 24 hours. While Despairing, they cannot take any voluntary action. Those who succeed still take 8d10 Psychic damage. You must, by the end of the pact, reduce a region to hopelessness (no recovery efforts, no new construction, no births). Failure results in permanent death. You cannot be revived by any means.



========================================================================
  MARKDOWN: Eyum TTRPG/5.0 Deities (WIP)/Godly Pacts.md
========================================================================

Gods gain power from their subjects. They typically want people to spread their name and gain good reputation. Gods punishments are usually not very severe.

> For condition references see [[2.4 Conditions]]. For damage type references see [[2.2 Damage Types]].

## Ignivar
*Fire/Heat*

**Tier 1 (1 day):** You gain Resistance to Fire damage. As a bonus action, you may wreathe your weapon or fists in flame until the end of your turn, dealing +1d10 Fire damage on hit. You must, today, start a fight or publicly challenge someone. Failure results in you being unable to take the Attack action for 1 day (you can still cast spells and use abilities).

**Tier 2 (2 days):** Once per turn when you take damage, you build 1 Heat Charge (max 5). Your next attack deals +2d10 Fire damage per Charge spent. You must, once per day, destroy something of value (at least 10 Gold worth). Failure results in On Fire (3 stacks) at the start of each day for 2 days.

**Tier 3 (4 days):** Once per short rest, as an action, you unleash a 60 ft line of fire (10 ft wide). Creatures must make a DEX save (DC 14) or take 6d10 Fire damage and gain On Fire (3 stacks).
